scope: Ancient Memphis MVP: early Ptah / Hwt-ka-Ptah precinct and Kom el-Fakhry / Mit Rahina settlement evidence.

sources.title: UNESCO: Memphis and its Necropolis
sources.relevance: World Heritage context for Memphis, Saqqara, Mit Rahina, and monument landscape.
sources.licenseStatus: Official web page; no broad ML-training license recorded in this pass.
blockedUses: runtime media use without separate rights check
sources.reviewNotes: Use for concise cited facts and scope validation.

sources.title: British Museum: Temple of Ptah, Memphis
sources.relevance: Identifier for Hwt-ka-Ptah / Hut-Ka-Ptah as the Great Temple of Memphis.
sources.licenseStatus: British Museum images are generally CC BY-NC-SA for non-commercial use or require licensing; item pages must be checked individually.
sources.reviewNotes: Use text facts with citation; avoid image datasets unless explicit permission or compatible license exists.

sources.title: Egypt Ministry of Tourism and Antiquities: Temple of Ptah blocks
sources.relevance: Official update about blocks believed to belong to the Great Temple of Ptah.
sources.licenseStatus: MoTA media hub states all rights reserved.
sources.reviewNotes: Use as official citation only unless MoTA grants permission.

sources.title: AERA: Memphis
sources.relevance: Mit Rahina, Kom el-Fakhry field school, Ptah Temple West Gate, and project bibliography.
sources.licenseStatus: AERA page footer states all rights reserved.
sources.reviewNotes: Very important for reconstruction notes, but do not train on images or PDFs without permission.

sources.title: SFAR: Kom el-Fakhry Archaeological Project
sources.relevance: Current project page for Kom el-Fakhry / MKAP.
sources.licenseStatus: No broad open ML-training license found in this pass.
sources.reviewNotes: Use for source discovery and factual research notes. Ask permission for dataset or media reuse.

sources.title: JARCE: Rediscovering Memphis preliminary report
sources.relevance: Recent publication metadata for the 2023 MKAP season at Kom el-Fakhry.
sources.licenseStatus: Publisher page; article license not verified in this pass.
blockedUses: full-text RAG ingestion without license review
sources.reviewNotes: Use title/abstract/citation only until full license is reviewed.

sources.title: Petrie: Memphis I
sources.relevance: Early excavation report for Memphis.
sources.licenseStatus: 1909 publication; candidate public-domain source, but item-level status must be recorded before bulk use.
sources.reviewNotes: Good candidate for OCR/RAG and plate study once local rights verification is logged.

sources.title: Petrie: The Palace of Apries (Memphis II)
sources.relevance: Memphis excavation report; later-period palace context.
sources.licenseStatus: 1909 publication; candidate public-domain source, but item-level status must be recorded before bulk use.
sources.reviewNotes: Useful as Memphis topographic context, not an Old Kingdom temple plan.

sources.title: Petrie: Meydum and Memphis III
sources.relevance: Memphis and comparative archaeological publication.
sources.licenseStatus: 1910 publication; candidate public-domain source, but item-level status must be recorded before bulk use.
sources.reviewNotes: Useful for historical research and public-domain plate/OCR experiments.

sources.title: Wikimedia Commons: Temple of Ptah in Memphis
sources.relevance: Open media category for Ptah temple remains and related artifacts.
sources.licenseStatus: File-level licenses vary; Commons requires free licenses or public-domain status.
blockedUses: fine-tuning without per-file license capture; non-CC0 files in training unless legal review approves
sources.reviewNotes: Prefer CC0/public-domain files for datasets. Preserve author, license, and file URL.

sources.title: Wikimedia Commons: Mit Rahina
sources.relevance: Open media category for modern Mit Rahina and Memphis remains.
sources.licenseStatus: File-level licenses vary; Commons requires free licenses or public-domain status.
blockedUses: fine-tuning without per-file license capture; non-CC0 files in training unless legal review approves
sources.reviewNotes: Use as discovery, not as blanket license approval.

sources.title: The Met Open Access
sources.relevance: Large ancient Egyptian collection with public-domain images and metadata.
sources.licenseStatus: Open Access images/data under CC0 where designated.
sources.reviewNotes: Primary safe source for visual style, artifacts, clothing, tools, reliefs, and daily-life references.

sources.title: The Met: Relief depicting cattle farming
sources.relevance: Old Kingdom relief with people, animals, clothing, and paint traces.
sources.licenseStatus: Object page marks image as Public Domain.
sources.reviewNotes: Good seed for wall/relief and everyday-life visual references.

sources.title: Cleveland Museum of Art Open Access
sources.relevance: Egyptian collection with CC0 public-domain object images and metadata.
sources.licenseStatus: CC0 for designated public-domain artworks/images/data.
sources.reviewNotes: Good source for Egyptian art/object style references.

sources.title: Smithsonian Open Access
sources.relevance: CC0 2D/3D assets and metadata where designated Open Access.
sources.licenseStatus: CC0 for Open Access items; exceptions apply.
blockedUses: non-CC0 items, trademarks, culturally sensitive restricted materials
sources.reviewNotes: Useful for object/3D references when relevant Egyptian material exists.

sources.title: Walters Art Museum image rights
sources.relevance: Public-domain Egyptian objects with CC0 digital images and metadata where applicable.
sources.licenseStatus: CC0 for public-domain digital images and metadata through Walters interfaces; exceptions apply.
sources.reviewNotes: Use item-level checks before inclusion.

sources.title: Penn Museum collections data terms
sources.relevance: Egyptian collection metadata.
sources.licenseStatus: Downloaded collections datasets are CC BY 4.0; images are excluded.
blockedUses: image fine-tuning from Penn collection images without permission
sources.reviewNotes: Good metadata source with attribution; do not treat images as included.

sources.title: Thesaurus Linguae Aegyptiae
sources.relevance: Major lemmatized ancient Egyptian corpus and lemma resource.
sources.licenseStatus: Website use has registration/copyright conditions; use direct datasets where available.
blockedUses: scraping or bulk training from website without permission
sources.reviewNotes: Use for lookup and citation. Prefer official Hugging Face datasets for ML.

sources.title: TLA Earlier Egyptian original dataset on Hugging Face
sources.relevance: Earlier Egyptian sentences with hieroglyphs, transliteration, lemmatization, and German translation.
sources.licenseStatus: CC BY-SA 4.0; dataset card explicitly lists language-model training uses.
blockedUses: reconstructing entire ancient source texts; ignoring share-alike/attribution obligations
sources.reviewNotes: Best candidate for Ancient Egyptian language experiments; still needs expert review for app text.

sources.title: Project Gutenberg: The Literature of the Ancient Egyptians
sources.relevance: Public-domain historical translations and background.
sources.licenseStatus: Project Gutenberg public-domain status in the USA with PG license conditions.
blockedUses: using outdated translations as final truth without modern review
sources.reviewNotes: Useful for background; Egyptology is outdated and must be checked.

sources.title: Natural Earth
sources.relevance: Public-domain base map data.
sources.licenseStatus: Public domain.
sources.reviewNotes: Useful for broad geography, not exact ancient Nile reconstruction.

sources.title: OpenStreetMap copyright and license
sources.relevance: Modern coordinate and map context around Mit Rahina.
sources.licenseStatus: Open Database License with attribution and share-alike requirements.
blockedUses: mixing into proprietary database without ODbL compliance
sources.reviewNotes: Keep OSM-derived data separate and attributed.

sources.title: Egypt Ministry Media Hub
sources.relevance: Official media, images, video, 3D/360 when available.
sources.licenseStatus: All rights reserved.
sources.reviewNotes: Use only as a citation/source-discovery layer unless permission is granted.

sources.title: Digital Egypt for Universities
sources.relevance: Educational context, object pages, site reconstructions, diagrams, plans.
sources.licenseStatus: UCL describes the site's media as copyrighted; third-party metadata suggests non-commercial terms in some mirrors.
sources.reviewNotes: Useful for research orientation. Get permission or item-level license before dataset use.

sources.title: Digital Giza
sources.relevance: Old Kingdom comparative architecture, tomb scenes, documentation, and 3D reconstruction methods.
sources.licenseStatus: Free research access; item-level rights must be checked.
blockedUses: fine-tuning or runtime media without item-level license
sources.reviewNotes: Useful comparator, not direct Memphis source. Do not scrape as dataset.
